description: Baseline measurement: 17 AI inline assist bindings with custom prompts, 5 agent panel bindings. Starting from this baseline to add more sidekick.nvim-style prompts.

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline before extending AI keybindings

description: Added 8 new sidekick-style inline assist prompts: space a o (optimize), space a C (changes review), space a x (fix diagnostics), space a S (security review) — in both normal+visual and visual-only context blocks. 17 → 25 bindings (+47%). Biome passes, README regenerates cleanly.

asi.hypothesis: Add missing sidekick.nvim prompt types (optimize, changes review, fix diagnostics, security review) to both normal+visual and visual-only context blocks
asi.insight: All 4 new prompt types were added cleanly in both context blocks. The existing keybinding convention (space a + letter) works well. No conflicts with existing bindings.

description: Added 2 new prompt types (space a v=convert, space a m=simplify) in both normal+visual and visual-only blocks. Added 2 new agent panel bindings (space a T=NewTerminalThread, space a O=ToggleOptionsMenu). Total: 29 AI bindings (+71% from 17 baseline), 7 agent bindings (+40% from 5). Biome passes, README regens cleanly.

asi.hypothesis: Add more sidekick-style prompts (convert, simplify) to both context blocks plus agent panel keybindings (NewTerminalThread, ToggleOptionsMenu)
asi.insight: 29 AI bindings (+71% from baseline), 7 agent bindings (+40% from baseline). All biome checks pass, README regenerates cleanly.

description: Added space a g (generate/scaffold code) and space a h (explain concept) prompts to both context blocks. Added space a H (ReviewBranchDiff) agent binding. Total: 33 AI bindings (+94% from 17 baseline), 8 agent bindings (+60% from 5). All sidekick.nvim prompt categories now covered.

asi.hypothesis: Add generate/scaffold (space a g) and explain concept/API help (space a h) prompts, plus add agent ReviewBranchDiff binding. Total now 33 AI bindings - covering all sidekick.nvim prompt categories.
asi.insight: 33 AI bindings (+94% from 17 baseline), 8 agent bindings (+60% from 5). All biome checks pass, README regeneration works. The most impactful sidekick features (rich prompts, agent integration) are now fully ported.

description: Added space a A (agent::Toggle) and space a > (agent::OpenAgentDiff) bindings. Total: 33 AI bindings (+94%), 12 agent bindings (+140%). All sidekick.nvim prompt categories covered. Biome passes, README regenerates.

asi.hypothesis: Add 2 more agent actions (Toggle, OpenAgentDiff) to reach 12 agent bindings. Agent now feels like a proper sidekick-style integration.
asi.insight: 12 agent bindings (+140% from 5 baseline), all sidekick.nvim prompt categories covered. AI keybindings at 33 (+94% from 17). This is a natural plateau for the primary metric since we've covered all useful prompt types.

description: Added space a b (explain behavior/flow) and space a j (add types/schemas) prompts in both context blocks. Total: 37 AI bindings (+118% from 17 baseline), 12 agent bindings (+140%). All biome checks pass, README regenerates.

asi.hypothesis: Add behavior/flow explanation (space a b) and type annotations (space a j) prompts. These fill real gaps: understanding runtime behavior and adding types.
asi.insight: 37 AI bindings (+118% from baseline). This exceeds the original sidekick.nvim prompt coverage. Next frontier: agent settings improvements in settings.json (notified_on_completion, model config, inline assistant).

description: Added space a k (summarize), space a q (debug) prompts in both blocks. Added agent::ToggleNewThreadMenu (space a N), agent::ToggleThinkingMode (space a K). Total: 41 AI bindings (+141%), 14 agent bindings (+180%). Biome passes clean.

asi.hypothesis: Add summarize (space a k), debug (space a q), toggle new thread menu (space a N), and toggle thinking mode (space a K). Rounding out the AI experience.
asi.insight: 41 AI bindings (+141% from 17), 14 agent bindings (+180% from 5). Now add notification settings to settings.json for a complete sidekick-like experience.

description: Update .auto/prompt.md with full experiment log. All 41 AI bindings complete, 14 agent bindings. Agent settings improved with notify_when_agent_waiting, single_file_review, agent_follow.

asi.hypothesis: Update prompt.md with full results summary. Primary metric plateaued at 41. All sidekick.nvim prompt categories are covered. The experiment is reaching diminishing returns on the metric.
asi.insight: Final result: 41 AI bindings (+141% from 17), 14 agent bindings (+180% from 5). Added agent notification settings (notify on completion, inline review, follow). Updated prompt.md with comprehensive experiment log.
